security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be spoofed without signature verification.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system accepts unsigned votes from external actors.

assumptions: The governance contract does not enforce signature verification for vote messages.
The actor is able to access the voting interface without authentication.
The system does not employ mechanisms to prevent duplicate vote submissions from the same actor

mitigation.strategy: Require signature-based vote authentication and role validation.

description: An attacker may impersonate a user and submit fraudulent votes to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be tampered with without adequate validation.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system may not adequately validate vote messages.

assumptions: The governance contract does not adequately validate the integrity of vote messages.
The actor is able to manipulate the vote message before submission.
Malicious actors might be able to modify the vote data in transit

mitigation.strategy: Implement input validation and integrity checks on vote messages.

description: An attacker may alter a user's vote, changing its outcome.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote submission lacks sufficient logging and auditing.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not guarantee the accountability of vote submissions.

assumptions: The system does not maintain adequate logs of vote submissions.
The system lacks robust audit trails to track votes.
The user does not provide any identifiers during voting

mitigation.strategy: Implement detailed logging and auditing for vote submissions.

description: An attacker can cast votes without verifiable attribution.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote data may be exposed during transmission or storage.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Vote data may be transmitted and stored insecurely.

assumptions: Vote data is transmitted over an insecure channel.
Vote data is stored in an insecure database.
Data is exposed during transit or processing without appropriate encryption

mitigation.strategy: Secure data transmission channels (HTTPS) and storage (encryption at rest).

description: Sensitive voting data might be exposed to unauthorized entities.

security_gap.gap_description: The governance contract lacks resilience to malicious vote submissions.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system may not be resilient to large-scale vote spamming.

assumptions: The governance contract does not implement rate limiting or other anti-DoS measures.
An attacker can submit a large number of spurious votes.
The system might not be designed to handle high load and might crash under heavy traffic

mitigation.strategy: Implement rate limiting, input validation, and other DoS mitigation techniques.

description: An attacker may overload the governance contract with fraudulent votes.
